Traceable Documentation with Doxygen & Spexygen

modules.name: spexygen
documentation:
Spexygen is a Doxygen extension for creating traceable technical
specifications, such as:
- traceable requirement specifications
- traceable source code
- traceable tests
- traceable specifications of other kind
!/usr/bin/env python
_Spexygen_ - Traceable Specifications Based on doxygen

classes.name: spexygen.Spexygen

methods.name: spexygen.Spexygen.debug
documentation: debug output (if requesed in command-line parameters)

methods.name: spexygen.Spexygen.on_file_pattern
documentation: return True if file-name is recognizable to Spexygen

methods.name: spexygen.Spexygen.on_gen_fw_trace
documentation: recursively generate the forward trace for a "uid"

methods.name: spexygen.Spexygen.uid_begin
documentation:
set the current uid 'self._uid' and 'self._kind'
if UID found in the given 'line'

methods.name: spexygen.Spexygen.uid_end
documentation: return True if UID-end was found in the "line"

methods.name: spexygen.Spexygen.uid_bw_trace
documentation: return True if bw-trace placeholder found in "line"

methods.name: spexygen.Spexygen.uid_tr
documentation: return list of backward traces found in a given "line"

methods.name: spexygen.Spexygen.trace
documentation:
trace a given file and harvest the traces into the
dictionaries: self._uid_brief_dict and self._uid_trace_dict

methods.name: spexygen.Spexygen.gen_bw_trace
documentation:
find a bw-trace placeholder
as long as bw-trace found
return True if bw-trace placeholder or "@tr{}" found

methods.name: spexygen.Spexygen.gen_fw_trace
documentation:
find a fw-trace placeholder and generate fw-trace
return True if the placeholder found

methods.name: spexygen.Spexygen.gen
documentation:
generate a given file, replacing the detected placeholdrs
with information from the dictionaries:
self._uid_brief_dict and self._uid_trace_dict

methods.name: spexygen.Spexygen.main
documentation:
main entry point to Spexygen
process command-line arguments and run Spexygen
Spexygen class that encapsulates tracing and code generation
